title: Simple Crosshair Editor
description: Create and customize your own pixel-based crosshair in-game.
body:
## **Simple Crosshair Editor**-
is a lightweight and user friendly mod that lets you design your own custom crosshair directly in-game.

Instead of being stuck with the default crosshair, you can create your own style using a pixel editor with full control over shape, size, colour and more.

##  Some of the Features:
- Pixel-Based Crosshair editor
- Adjustable thickness, width, and length
- Custom color controls 
- Elytra Equipped Indicator
- Multiple Presents and Profiles
- Adjustable Opacity **New**
- Player Attack Indicator **New**
- and more

### 🎮 How to Use:

Press '.' to open the crosshair editor or set a different keybind. You can change it to your liking in controls.

I recommend not using any other crosshair related mod with this but the [Crosshair Addons public](https://modrinth.com/mod/crosshair-addons-public) mod works with it and is the only one I tested. You can use it for even more features.
let me know through discord or github if there's any problems you are facing.

thanks for 3k downloads❤️
More features coming soon!
